name: Pear & Raisin Charoses
recipeIngredient: 2 small Pears, cored and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the pears, apricots, raisins, honey, lemon juice, and cinnamon. Mix well.
2. Stir in the wine.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
Each serving provides: 1/2 FR, 10 C. Per serving: 43 cal, 0 g fat, 11 g carbs, 1 mg sodium, 0 mg cholesterol.
